description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the dev.gitlab.org:5005/gitlab/gitlab-build-images:gitlab-puppeteer Docker image and three stages: build, test, and deploy. In the build stage add a build job that runs `yarn install`, `yarn storybook-static`, and `mv storybook public` and stores the node_modules/ and public/ directories as artifacts, and a manual update_snapshots job that runs `yarn install`, `yarn visual-test --updateSnapshot`, configures git user.email and user.name, adds, commits, and pushes changes with the GITLAB_TOKEN. In the test stage add a lint job that runs `yarn lint` and `yarn prettier --list-different **/*.scss`, a test job that runs `yarn test`, and a visual job that runs `yarn visual-test` and always publishes the storyshots/__image_snapshots__/ directory as an artifact. In the deploy stage add a pages job that depends on build, runs `echo "Deploying to Pages"`, publishes the public/ directory as an artifact and runs only on the master branch; a publish job that runs `yarn install` and `$(yarn bin)/semantic-release` also only on master; a review job that depends on build, runs `rsync -av --delete public /srv/nginx/pages/$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG`, creates a review environment named review/$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG with a stop job review_stop, runs on all branches except master, and uses tags nginx, review-apps, deploy; a manual review_stop job that stops the review environment, removes the files, runs on branches except master with the same tags; and an upload_artifacts job that depends on build, runs `yarn install`, `yarn pack --filename csslab.$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG.tgz`, echoes the artifact URL, and always stores the generated tgz as an artifact.
